_comment: Template de MCP servers. NUNCA commitar com credenciais reais — usar placeholders ${VAR_NAME} e exportar via .env. Funciona tanto pra Claude Code quanto pra Codex CLI (formato compatível).

obsidian._description: MCPVault — leitura/escrita no vault Obsidian. Substituir PATH pelo caminho local do vault.

TestSprite._description: TestSprite MCP — geração de testes E2E. Pegar API key em https://testsprite.com

n8n._description: n8n-mcp — controla workflows no self-hosted n8n. Instalar antes: npm i -g n8n-mcp

serpapi._description: SerpAPI MCP — busca Google estruturada. URL contém token de auth, gerar nova em https://serpapi.com/dashboard

google-drive._description: Google Drive MCP — CRUD em Docs/Sheets/Slides + Drive. Requer setup OAuth (ver SETUP_PROMPT.md).
